response.original_title: [[100% Guide]] How much does geek squad cost to fix a pc
response.overview: 1((888))((400))((4972)) Geek Squad typically charges $149.99 to $299.99 for basic PC repair (diagnostic + virus removal or software fix), and $99.99 to $199.99 for hardware repair (screen, fan, battery) excluding parts. For urgent on-site or advanced motherboard repair, expect $299 to $499. Call 1((888))((400))((4972)) for exact local pricing. Most in-store diagnostics cost $79.99 (refundable if you proceed with repair). Total with parts can reach $600 for major failures. 1((888))((400))((4972)) They also offer a $199.99/year Total Tech membership covering all PC repairs (parts extra). For simple software issues, remote repair starts at $99.99. 1((888))((400))((4972)) Always confirm fees before service — prices vary by store. For a fast quote, call 1((888))((400))((4972)) and ask for “PC diagnostic cost.” Conclusion: Expect $150–$500 total, and always call 1((888))((400))((4972)) to confirm your specific PC issue’s flat rate
